issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.

scenarios.name: ios-metadata-rewrite-zenflow
scenarios.rationale: Treatment respects the 30/30/100 character splits, deduplicates keywords across fields, uses comma-no-space in the keyword field, picks singular OR plural, and avoids 'app'/category names and competitor brands; baseline rewrites copy but typically duplicates terms and ignores the keyword-field formatting rules.

scenarios.name: google-play-screenshot-ab-test
scenarios.rationale: Treatment cites Google Play Experiments' 5-variant limit, recommends 7-14 day runs, prioritizes screenshots over icon and description, and ties success to install conversion plus first-3-visible/one-message-per-screenshot design rules; baseline gives generic A/B advice without the platform-specific constraints.
